highlights.text: I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “My lean is to defer to the trend.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
The first building block is the elevator down sell and this refers to a period where ES flushes every support with ease.
This occurs however only when ES puts in my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
They firstly wait for a vertical, elevator down sell.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “Below there one very obvious trade is a Failed Breakdown of the December 17th 6773 low.
Where do big, successful Failed Breakdowns target?
With all that done, the task for bulls would be to try and buy the dip again.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.
Typically, it becomes a magnet which then needs to be back-tested.
7006 is a big magnet.” Yesterday, we hit 7006 almost exact, and dipped.

post_title: The Tight Coil Continues In SPX. Is A Big Move Close? February 12th Plan
